claimText: The University of Amsterdam is developing its own AI chat environment called UvA AI Chat, which is similar to ChatGPT but is fully self-managed and specifically designed for UvA students, lecturers and staff.
normalizedValue: UvA AI Chat is official self-managed AI tool for UvA community

citation.citationTitle: AI in education - University of Amsterdam
citation.sourceRights: Official university guidance. Rights reserved by University of Amsterdam.
